The '''Wuorl''' were a frog-like [[Species/Legends|species]] that lived in the branches of the [[Greenstalk]] trees on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] in the [[Freeworlds Territory]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].

The Wuorl were considered a delicacy and were harvested for their flesh.

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] usually ate them for breakfast.
